riem v0.1.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Forecasting temperature at your vacation destination
  • Changelog

rOpenSci: The riem package

This package allows to get weather data from ASOS stations (airports) via the great website of the Iowa Environment Mesonet.

Installation

Install the package with:

install.packages("riem")

Or install the development version using devtools with:

library("devtools")
install_github("ropensci/riem")

Documentation

Please refer to the pkgdown website to read docs, in particular the reference and the vignettes.

Use cases in the wild

Submit your use cases by opening a new issue!

  • @maelle’s Where to live in the US

  • @Ryo-N7’s Where to live in Japan: XKCD-themed climate plots and maps!

  • @sharlagelfand’s Oh, the cold places I’ve lived

  • In a course: @byuidatascience’s M335 Task 15: How is the weather?

Meta

  • Please report any issues or bugs.
  • License: GPL
  • Get citation information for ropenaq in R doing citation(package = 'riem')
  • Please note that this project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By participating in this project you agree to abide by its terms.

    https://​cloud.r-project.org/​package=riem
